languages.text: "Рефракционный трансмутатор. Мне пришлось заточить его вместе с Нунциусом — если его удалить, то смерть наступит почти мгновенно. Естественно, это лишь гипотеза, основанная на анализе состояния коллеги. Гипотеза, проверять которую мне не хочется".

"A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."
languages.original_text: "Рефракционный трансмутатор. Мне пришлось заточить его вместе с Нунциусом — если его удалить, то смерть наступит почти мгновенно. Естественно, это лишь гипотеза, основанная на анализе состояния коллеги. Гипотеза, проверять которую мне не хочется".

traits.locale_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

"A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

"A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

languages.text: «Es un transmutador refractivo. Tuve que confinarlo junto con Nuncius; de haberlo extraído, su muerte habría sido casi instantánea. Por supuesto, no es más que una hipótesis basada en un análisis del estado de mi colega. Pero no albergo ningún deseo de ponerla a prueba».
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: «Es un transmutador refractivo. Tuve que confinarlo junto con Nuncius; de haberlo extraído, su muerte habría sido casi instantánea. Por supuesto, no es más que una hipótesis basada en un análisis del estado de mi colega. Pero no albergo ningún deseo de ponerla a prueba».

languages.text: “那是个折射转化仪。我不得不把它和努恩修斯一起封存。一旦移除，他会当场毙命。当然，这只是我基于同僚状况分析得出的推测。一个我不想验证的推测。”
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: “那是个折射转化仪。我不得不把它和努恩修斯一起封存。一旦移除，他会当场毙命。当然，这只是我基于同僚状况分析得出的推测。一个我不想验证的推测。”

languages.text: « Un transmutateur réfractif. J'ai dû le laisser avec Nuncius, car il est probable que la mort s'ensuive presque immédiatement s'il lui était retiré. Ce n'est qu'une hypothèse fondée sur l'analyse de l'état de mon collègue, mais je n'ai aucune envie de la mettre à l'épreuve. »
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: « Un transmutateur réfractif. J'ai dû le laisser avec Nuncius, car il est probable que la mort s'ensuive presque immédiatement s'il lui était retiré. Ce n'est qu'une hypothèse fondée sur l'analyse de l'état de mon collègue, mais je n'ai aucune envie de la mettre à l'épreuve. »

languages.text: "Kırılmalı dönüştürücü. Onu Nuncius ile birlikte kapatmak zorundaydım. Çıkarılması hâlinde ölüm anında gerçekleşirdi. Elbette bu, meslektaşımın durumunun analizine dayanan bir hipotez. Test etmeye hiç niyetim olmayan bir hipotez."
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: "Kırılmalı dönüştürücü. Onu Nuncius ile birlikte kapatmak zorundaydım. Çıkarılması hâlinde ölüm anında gerçekleşirdi. Elbette bu, meslektaşımın durumunun analizine dayanan bir hipotez. Test etmeye hiç niyetim olmayan bir hipotez."

languages.text: "Ein Refraktionstransmuter. Ich musste ihn zusammen mit Nuncius einschließen ... würde er entfernt, käme der Tod nahezu augenblicklich. Das ist natürlich nur eine auf der Analyse des Zustandes meines Kollegen basierende These. Eine Hypothese, die ich nicht testen möchte."
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: "Ein Refraktionstransmuter. Ich musste ihn zusammen mit Nuncius einschließen ... würde er entfernt, käme der Tod nahezu augenblicklich. Das ist natürlich nur eine auf der Analyse des Zustandes meines Kollegen basierende These. Eine Hypothese, die ich nicht testen möchte."

languages.text: 「屈折変成装置です。私はそれをヌンキウスもろとも封じ込めねばなりませんでした――それを取り除けば、ほぼ即座に死が訪れるでしょうから。もっとも、これは我が同僚の状態の分析に基づく、一つの仮説にすぎません。私が試したいとは思わぬ仮説です」
languages.original_text: "A refractive transmuter. I had to confine it together with Nuncius — if it were removed, death would follow almost instantly. Of course, this is only a hypothesis based on an analysis of my colleague's condition. A hypothesis I have no desire to test."

traits.locale_text: 「屈折変成装置です。私はそれをヌンキウスもろとも封じ込めねばなりませんでした――それを取り除けば、ほぼ即座に死が訪れるでしょうから。もっとも、これは我が同僚の状態の分析に基づく、一つの仮説にすぎません。私が試したいとは思わぬ仮説です」
